title: Record final bounded archive-growth budget before release closure
rawUserRequest: 继续完成当前文档工单；为最后预算工单归档与发布归档修复归档建立最终有界预算，并完成完整 PR、合并、清理和默认分支同步流程。

declaredIntent.summary: 一次性覆盖最终预算归档和发布归档修复归档的两条不可变证据记录。

outOfScope: Changing release archive bytes or publishing a tag.

riskAssessment.reason: Bounded policy-only final calibration with explicit repayment ownership.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized completion of the full release plan.

preReviewWarnings: Final budget must cover two forthcoming immutable archive records.
acceptance: The complexity guard reports archiveGrowth=474 and passes with the ceiling set to 474.
The repayment ledger records a user-owned 472-to-474 reservation tied to this Work Item.
Finish Gate, PR checks, merge, closure, and default-branch synchronization complete.
guidelines: Do not rewrite or delete immutable archives.
Budget changes must be bounded and repayable.

intent.problem: The final budget Work Item and the pending release archive Work Item each add an immutable archive, so the complete sequence grows from 472 to 474.
constraints: Do not publish before lifecycle closure.
intent.rationale: A final bounded reservation avoids repeated budget recalibration while keeping the provider release source-bound.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: archiveGrowth=474 passes with a repayment record.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized completion of the full release plan and publication.

rollbackNote: Revert final budget calibration while preserving immutable evidence.
